name: Cheeseburger Bites
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper
In a bowl, combine egg yolk, ground beef, grated onions, salt, and pepper. Shape the mixture into 24 teaspoon-sized balls. Remove crusts from bread; roll each slice flat and cut into 1 - 1/2 inch rounds. Place meatballs on bread rounds, making sure to cover them with the meat mixture. Fill each ball with a cube of cheese in a depression made in the center. Arrange on a baking sheet. Broil in a preheated oven about 3 - 5 inches from heat for 3 - 5 minutes, or until no pink remains. Garnish with ketchup, mustard, sliced green onions, or sliced dill pickles if desired.
